CVE-2010-2891.title: Buffer overflow in the smiGetNode function in lib/smi.c in libsmi ...
CVE-2010-2891.description: Buffer overflow in the smiGetNode function in lib/smi.c in libsmi 0.4.8 allows context-dependent attackers to execute arbitrary code via an Object Identifier (aka OID) represented as a numerical string containing many components separated by . (dot) characters.
